requires.criterion: a credible source was verified this session

phrasings.text: before mcp__trading__execute runs, block it unless an AI judge confirms a credible source

provenance.known_limitation_note: The server emits type='evidence_gate' for this llm_critic+MCP-tool combination instead of a standard EvidencePolicy. The O1 oracle's policy_from_dict raises 'unknown policy type: evidence_gate'. Candidate live issue: the target_ir specifies requires=[{kind:llm_critic, criterion:...}] which should produce an EvidencePolicy, but the server routes this to a different evidence_gate archetype. O1 cannot verify the round-trip until policy_from_dict supports evidence_gate.
